{{CargoRelic
|name=Colossus of Rhodes
|class_id=22854
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The Colossus is located at the entrance of the port of Rhodes in ancient Greece. Built in honor of the Sun God Helios, it was an engineering marvel of the ancient world. Standing at about thirty-three meters tall, the colossus was cast in bronze. It wore a radiant halo on its head and held a massive torch as a lighthouse that guided passing ships day and night until an earthquake brought it down. Despite its fall, the remnants of the colossus continue to awe future generations, becoming a significant symbol of ancient Greek civilization.
|fame=63
|art=73
|fth=106
|civ=52
|tech=68
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 60<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 160<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 260<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 460<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 660<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +14<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 960<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +20<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 960<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +20<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Card Drops +6%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, food consumed -3%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
}}
